activities_projects.title: Theme and Message Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Critically analyse the central theme and message of the story
steps: Read the story carefully
Identify the main theme and supporting ideas
Explain how wisdom influences the outcome of the story
Write a detailed paragraph analysing the theme
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking and thematic interpretation skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Character Analysis Essay
activities_projects.objective: Examine the personality traits and motivations of key characters
steps: Identify the main characters in the story
Analyse their actions and decisions
Explain how wisdom influences their behaviour
Write a short essay describing the character traits with textual support
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to support character analysis with evidence
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of reasoning and supporting details (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Conflict and Resolution Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand how conflicts develop and are resolved in the story
steps: Identify the main conflict presented in the story
Describe the challenges faced by the characters
Explain how wisdom leads to the resolution
Create a short written explanation of the conflict and resolution
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand narrative conflict and problem-solving strategies
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and clarity of explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Narrative Structure Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Analyse the structure of the story
steps: Identify the introduction, rising action, climax, and resolution
Write these sections in sequence
Explain how the climax changes the direction of the story
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to recognise narrative structure in storytelling
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification of story elements (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Wisdom Activity
activities_projects.objective: Compare the concept of wisdom in this story with another story
steps: Choose another story that highlights wisdom
Compare the main characters and how they use intelligence
Write a comparative paragraph explaining similarities and differences
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of comparison and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Reconstruction
activities_projects.objective: Develop creative writing skills by reconstructing dialogues
steps: Choose a key moment from the story
Rewrite the scene in dialogue form
Ensure that the dialogue reflects the characters' personalities and wisdom
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance creative writing and character understanding
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and clarity of dialogue (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary and Context Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how vocabulary conveys meaning in the story
steps: Select five challenging words from the story
Explain their meanings using context clues
Use them in new sentences that reflect similar meanings
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct interpretation and sentence formation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Application Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Connect the story’s lesson with real-life situations
steps: Discuss situations in daily life where wisdom helps solve problems
Relate those situations to the story
Write a short reflection describing the connection
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to apply literary lessons to real-life contexts
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth and relevance of reflection (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Problem-Solving Scenario
steps: Imagine a new problem faced by the characters
Describe how the characters might solve it using wisdom
Write a short story continuation based on your idea
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop creative storytelling and reasoning

activities_projects.title: Reflective Essay on Wisdom
activities_projects.objective: Encourage deeper thinking about the value of wisdom in society
steps: Reflect on the importance of wisdom in decision-making
Use examples from the story to support your ideas
Write a short essay explaining how wisdom guides people in life
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop analytical and reflective writing skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity of ideas and logical explanation (10 marks)
